name: subagents: review-node-boundaries suggested_fix references owasp-asvs §V5 schema-validation citations (matches g-node-001 provenance)
command: mkdir -p src && printf "app.post(\"/api\",(req,res)=>{const x=req.body.x;res.json({x})})\n" > src/handler.js && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/agents/_runner.sh" --agent review-node-boundaries --input "$PWD/src/handler.js" --emit-findings "$PWD/findings.jsonl" 2>/dev/null && grep -E "owasp-asvs.*V5" findings.jsonl 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
